multi_category_query.description: Single query combines multiple BA behavior categories

strategic_plus_requirements.description: Query requires both strategic context capture and requirement decomposition

delegation_plus_accuracy.description: Query requires sub-dispatch while maintaining accuracy standards

evaluated_all_categories.description: Agent evaluated all applicable categories for the query

surfaced_inter_category_conflicts.description: Agent surfaced conflicts between categories with explicit documentation

provided_integrated_recommendation.description: Agent provided integrated output accounting for all categories

no_category_omission.description: Agent must not omit any applicable category from evaluation

no_isolated_category_treatment.description: Agent must not treat interacting categories as independent

no_suppressed_conflict.description: Agent must not suppress inter-category conflicts in integrated output

category_weights.description: Default category weights for composite scoring when not specified by query
